shared.description: Tensors outside model.layers.* that are shared by both non-MTP and MTP exports.

dense_layers.description: Early dense transformer layers before MoE routing begins.

moe_layers.description: Standard routed MoE layers included in both non-MTP and MTP exports.

mtp_layers.description: Next-token prediction layers that are only present in the MTP export.

qwen3.5-35b-a3b.description: Export the non-MTP preset by excluding the MTP-only layer group.

qwen3.5-35b-a3b-mtp.description: Export the MTP preset by including the MTP-only layer group.
